description: Sets camera shake parameters. Will not have any effect until shake is started via [[addCamShake]].
name: setCamShakeParams

Item.desc: strength of positional movement (how far the whole position can change in X,Y&Z). Should not be bigger than 0.1 to prevent the camera from moving into or behind the player
Item.name: posCoef

Item.desc: strength of vertical camera pan (up/down), practical range: 0..10
Item.name: vertCoef

Item.desc: strength of horizontal camera pan (left/right), practical range: 0..10
Item.name: horzCoef

Item.desc: strength of camera tilt/bank, practical range: 0..20
Item.name: bankCoef

Item.desc: if [[true]], then transitions in the different shaking directions will be smoother
Item.name: interpolation
